title: Farrendale
description: Open your world to Farrendale as you discover new types of dragons, fantastical creatures, immersive world animals while exploring all your new food, crops, plants and recipes! This is a great adventure mod to add to any fantasy world!
body:
Open your world to Farrendale as you discover new types of dragons, fantastical creatures, immersive world animals while exploring all your new food, crops, plants and recipes! This is a great adventure mod to add to any fantasy or mystical modpack, or play by itself!

This mod adds a wide variety of new plants and crops you can obtain through crafting with wheat seeds. You can use these to create new foods. Experiment and try cooking other Minecraft items to create more items you've never heard of!

The mod also adds an abundance of worldly creatures from beavers, snails, and moths to fantasy creatures such as ice dragons, cockatrices, basilisks, and geo dragons! Explore each biome to find the different creatures you can tame and bring into your pack.

The mod includes JEI compatibility so you are able to connect to finding the crafting recipes to all of the in game items from the Farrendale mod.
